Spring Data Core
  1. org.springframework.data.expression

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.expression

Packages that use org.springframework.data.expression
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.expression
Value Expression implementation.
org.springframework.data.mapping.model
Core implementation of the mapping subsystem's model.
org.springframework.data.repository.query
Support classes to work with query methods.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.expression used by org.springframework.data.expression
    Class
    Description
    ValueEvaluationContext
    Expressions are executed using an evaluation context.
    ValueEvaluationContextProvider
    SPI to provide to access a centrally defined potentially shared ValueEvaluationContext.
    ValueExpression
    An expression capable of evaluating itself against context objects.
    ValueExpressionParser
    Parses expression strings into expressions that can be evaluated.
    ValueParserConfiguration
    Configuration for ValueExpressionParser.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.expression used by org.springframework.data.mapping.model
    Class
    Description
    ValueEvaluationContext
    Expressions are executed using an evaluation context.
    ValueEvaluationContextProvider
    SPI to provide to access a centrally defined potentially shared ValueEvaluationContext.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.expression used by org.springframework.data.repository.query
    Class
    Description
    ValueEvaluationContextProvider
    SPI to provide to access a centrally defined potentially shared ValueEvaluationContext.
    ValueExpression
    An expression capable of evaluating itself against context objects.
    ValueExpressionParser
    Parses expression strings into expressions that can be evaluated.
